Mizoram Engineering Entrance Examination.verdict_note: careers360 confirms B.Arch General OR 1203 / CR 1251-1258 and getmyuni confirms CS 60031, ECE-SC 12556, IT-ST 5929 exactly, but both pages state these are JEE Main/JoSAA closing ranks, not MZUEEE's own exam ranks, so it should be labelled as a JEE-Main proxy.

Narsee Monjee Institute of Management St.verdict_note: collegedekho shows a 70-percentile General 2024 cutoff for NMIMS Kirit P. Mehta School of Law, but the page labels it a CLAT cutoff (NMIMS accepts CLAT or NMIMS-LAT), so it is plausible portal data rather than an NLAT-specific official figure.

National Standard Examination.verdict_note: pw.live confirms the NSE MAS thresholds Physics 99, Biology 70, Junior Science 86 (2023-24) and Physics 83 (2024-25 Group B); only Astronomy differs slightly (page shows MAS 87/76 vs sampled 84), so values are real IAPT qualification scores from a third-party portal.

Online Facilitation System for Students.verdict_note: careers360 confirms school-wise intermediate cutoff percentages including YASHWANT INTER SCHOOL KHIJARSARAI Science-SC 63.60; these are real OFSS class-11 admission minimum-mark cutoffs, correctly placed in the score column.

Paramedical State Common Entrance Test.verdict_note: collegedekho confirms JENPAS-UG qualifying scores General-50th 23.50 (2024), SC/ST/OBC-40th 21.33 (2024) & 24.50 (2023), OBC-B 120 and ST 80 (2022) exactly; real category qualifying percentile-scores in the correct column.

Puducherry Bachelor of Business Administ.verdict_note: selectyouruniversity confirms Pondicherry University BBA(Hons) 2024 cutoffs General up to 165, EWS 90-120, PH 37-58, ST 82, but the page states these are CUET scores (admission via CUET, not the named CENTAC BBA entrance), so it should be labelled a CUET proxy.
